## ReactLynxExternalsPresetOptions.url property

> Warning: This API is now obsolete.
> 
> Prefer `bundlePath`<!-- -->, which resolves through the runtime public path and enables automatic asset emission.
> 

Override the runtime bundle URL directly.

Use this only when the ReactLynx runtime is hosted outside the current build output, for example on a CDN. Unlike `bundlePath`<!-- -->, this does not emit any extra asset into the current compilation.

**Signature:**

```typescript
url?: string;
```
